title: Self-Contained Subplan
description: Delegate a complex, self-contained sub-task into a nested plan to keep the main graph readable.
when_to_use: A sub-task has three or more distinct internal steps.
The nested work is self-contained and would clutter the main plan if inlined.
skeleton: subplan: describe the delegated sub-task and include its nested nodes
synthesis/result: use the subplan final output in the parent plan
adaptation_notes: Never wrap a single tool call in a subplan.
Respect max subplan count and max subplan node limits from the prompt.
The nested plan should have the same node contract as the top-level plan.
Only use registered tool names inside the nested plan; if web_search is absent, do not invent it.
